eda6b91a-0339-417d-94b7-441386158a63.title:
Research the 'Great Emu War' of Australia. Find primary source documents or historical records, modern analysis of the event, and quote at least one passage from a historical document or contemporary news article about it. Provide URLs to all sources.

Benchmark rule: when external evidence is needed, run search then visit the best URLs. Visit pages to extract concrete details and cite visited URLs in the final answer.

7def64a6-37ca-4b9a-95d4-f580ea258185.title: Plan: Gather primary sources and modern analyses on the Great Emu War (1932) with quotes and URLs

details.mandate: Research the 'Great Emu War' of Australia. Find primary source documents or historical records, modern analysis of the event, and quote at least one passage from a historical document or contemporary news article about it. Provide URLs to all sources. Benchmark rule: when external evidence is needed, run search then visit the best URLs. Visit pages to extract concrete details and cite visited URLs in the final answer.

target_subproblems.title: Identify primary source documents and contemporaneous reporting (1932) with URLs
target_subproblems.description: Locate newspaper reports from 1932 (e.g., Trove-indexed Australian papers), official government records, and military notes related to the Emu War; extract citation details and direct quotes where possible.

target_subproblems.title: Identify modern analyses and reputable summaries
target_subproblems.description: Find trusted secondary sources such as encyclopedia entries, scholarly articles, and institutional histories that discuss the event, its context, and historiographical interpretations.

target_subproblems.title: Extract quotes with attribution
target_subproblems.description: From primary sources or contemporary news articles, pull at least one verbatim quote with citation (author, date, source title) and context for that quote.

target_subproblems.title: Compile complete source list with URLs
target_subproblems.description: Create a verifiable bibliography of all sources found, including type (primary/secondary), title, author, date, and a URL to the exact page read.

extraction_plan.step1: Search for terms: 'Great Emu War', 'Emu War 1932 primary source', 'Emu War newspaper 1932', 'Australian War Memorial Emu War', 'Trove emu war 1932'
extraction_plan.step2: Visit top 5–8 results to read full content and locate quotes and factual details
extraction_plan.step3: Record quotes with source, date, author (if available), and context
extraction_plan.step4: Compile sources with titles and URLs; categorize by primary source vs modern analysis
extraction_plan.step5: Provide citations in a consistent format and prepare a short extractable quote set

criteria: Quote is verbatim from the source with attribution
URL points to the exact source page
Source types include primary sources and modern analyses

notes: Prioritize accessible sources (e.g., Trove, Australian War Memorial, Britannica) to minimize access barriers and ensure quotes can be verified.
details.action: Execute a two-stage information gathering: 1) search for primary sources and modern analyses; 2) visit the top results to extract exact quotes and compile full citations with URLs.
